title: cattleya × citrinointermedia
intro: Cattleya × citrinointermedia, a hybrid orchid species, is a cross between Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya labiata, known for its vibrant yellow and orange flowers. While there is limited information on the medicinal properties of this specific plant, some members of the Cattleya genus have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cattleya species include improved cardiovascular health and immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. However, due to the lack of research on Cattleya × citrinointermedia specifically, herbal preparations of this plant are not well-documented, and it is not commonly used in traditional medicine.
